divergence: Rail barons built tracks to the afterlife and commuters complain about delays
story_angle: investigative report whose author is promoted mid-article specifically to stop the investigation
headline: Commuters Schedule Afterlife Delays as Soulbound Express Names New Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency
deck: Brennan Drizzle’s promotion rewards stalled souls with guaranteed ash-cloud transit credits.
article:
Inter-dimensional baron MacKinnon Squall installed Brennan Drizzle as the Soulbound Express efficiency auditor following a standard probe into chronic afterlife transit failures. The move follows last week’s derailment that absorbed 4,200 souls into the ether, meeting baronial quotas while incidentally polishing the ash-cloud views for those still waiting.

Drizzle, once tasked with dissecting bureaucratic snags, now champions the barons' three-solstice realignment targets. "Focus on optimizing the losses rather than questioning them," he stated, sounding like someone who has watched too many eternal check-in lines.

His first orders push throughput on every brass terrace facing magnetic north, stretching checkpoint waits even longer. Riders who once dreaded endless limbo now collect efficiency credits for each holdup, redeemable for assorted non-ghostly perks.

Baronial adjustments to the cosmic ledger may swell those same credits, offering a thin silver lining inside the administrative fog. Soul-bound travelers weigh whether the new perks offset the time and occasional lost companions along the route to rest.
author: Bharra Naitis, Chief Bureaucratic Correspondent

oped.title: Hats Off to Eternal Gridlock: Drizzle's Promotion Saves Us From Ourselves
oped.author: Sir Reginald Puffington, Emeritus Professor of Spectral Stasis and Sole Proprietor of the Official Afterlife Hat Registry
oped.body: Commuters whining about the Soulbound Express delays should stop clutching their ridiculous fedoras and thank Brennan Drizzle for his promotion. His ash-cloud credits reward true efficiency by teaching stalled souls the virtue of patient vapor. Without these pauses, how would we distinguish worthy phantoms from those flashy ones whose wide-brimmed hats allegedly interfere with signal towers? I, for one, have never experienced such blockage—my own collection of sensible derbies remains perfectly calibrated. The real solution is mandatory hat inspections at every station, with fines funneled directly to credentialed experts like myself. Anything less invites chaos from impatient ectoplasm. These complainers forget that rail barons built the tracks for order, not speed. If souls truly valued transit, they would abandon their millinery vanities and embrace the dignified crawl Drizzle so wisely endorses.

classifieds.text: Soulbound Express stall-ticket, half-used, includes one ash-cloud credit; owner promoted to eternal auditor under Drizzle, must liquidate before final departure.
Ghostly Efficiency Auditor seeks two junior delay counters for the new Soulbound line; must tolerate Brennan Drizzle’s ash quotas and commute through active derailments.
Found: one glowing ledger of stalled souls, initialed B.D.; claim at Platform 13 before the next guaranteed transit credit expires or it joins the queue.
Desperate widow seeks fellow commuter who missed the same Drizzle promotion; willing to share remaining ash credits for company on the eternal siding.

panels.caption: "Soulbound Express names Brennan Drizzle Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency," the poster read.
Drizzle stamped a delay form: "Stalled souls get ash-cloud credits now. Progress."
A commuter sighed: "Finally, my haunting has a fiscal sponsor."

joke.setup: The Soulbound Express just appointed its new auditor of ghostly efficiency to cut afterlife delays across the irradiated tracks.
joke.punchline: First decree: any soul still bitching about the schedule gets reassigned to shovel cinders in the engine until the radiation finishes the job.
joke.text: The Soulbound Express just appointed its new auditor of ghostly efficiency to cut afterlife delays across the irradiated tracks. First decree: any soul still bitching about the schedule gets reassigned to shovel cinders in the engine until the radiation finishes the job.

sponsor_ads.headline: Spectral FastPass: Pre-Audit Your Soul Before the New Efficiency Inspector Boards
sponsor_ads.body: Stamp your own departure papers with our rail-baron licensed ecto-seals and slip past the Soulbound Express backlog without becoming another statistic in the ghostly ledger.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Delays remain mandatory. Auditor's ruling supersedes all schedules.

sponsor_ads.headline: Official Auditor-Approved Delay Justification Forms
sponsor_ads.body: File your afterlife lateness in triplicate using our pre-filled spectral excuses, now endorsed by the newly appointed Ghostly Efficiency Auditor for the Soulbound line.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Forms dissolve after 3636 years. No refunds on lost time or souls.

sponsor_ads.headline: Commuter-Grade Ectoplasm Repellent for Platform Overcrowding
sponsor_ads.body: Spray on before boarding to keep fellow delayed passengers from phasing through your seat during the latest Soulbound Express holdup caused by the efficiency audit.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not proven against rail baron bureaucracy or actual ghosts.

sponsor_ads.headline: Soulbound Express Timetable Correction Service
sponsor_ads.body: Purchase our revised schedules that politely list every delay as 'auditor-mandated spectral optimization' so you can plan your wasteland eternity accordingly.
sponsor_ads.tagline: All times are approximate. Eternity waits for no one except the barons.

stories.headline: Ash-Cloud Transit Credits Issued to Stalled Souls Boost Rail Baron Dividends by 12 Percent
stories.deck: Auditor Drizzle's first report lists three additional derailments as 'on schedule'
stories.article:
Rail barons reported that Brennan Drizzle's new post has already minted 4,200 fresh transit credits for Soulbound Express passengers. Redeemable solely in ash storms, the credits have been bundled into bonds listed on the Nevosca Exchange.

Winnowing Halo Rail Consortium shares climbed after the announcement, as analysts calculated that each delayed soul now yields roughly 0.7 extra fares before reaching its destination.

stories.headline: Clerics of the Northward Faith Demand Extra Ash for Sunday Soul Transfers
stories.deck: Congregants report that magnetic orientation of pews now conflicts with new express timetables
stories.article:
The Synod of Constellation Voices lodged a complaint today over the Soulbound Express timetable changes under the new auditor. At the Grand Brass Chapel, aligned to magnetic north like every Nevosca structure, services keep getting dusted by efficiency-driven ash falls.

Clergy observed that the lower register of their hymns now lands exactly on derailment announcements, leading to requests for extra ash allotments to preserve ritual standards during rush commuting periods.

real_world_echo: New EU border system tripling time at passport control — mirrored as afterlife rail checkpoints tripling soul transit times under baron oversight
